text.title: Claude Best Practices Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure from sub-task list to validated production policy pack.

step.name: Build the model-tier table.
step.description: Input: sub-task list. Action: assign each sub-task to {Haiku|Sonnet|Opus}; pin full-date ids; sanity-check Opus is not in any high-throughput inner loop. Output: tier table dict.

step.name: Author the cached system prompt structure.
step.description: Input: system prompt requirements. Action: assemble `[{type:text, text:STATIC, cache_control:{type:ephemeral}}, {type:text, text:DYNAMIC}]`; verify STATIC ≥1024 tokens; lock JSON key order. Output: cached system list.
step.note: Step 2. Required input: system prompt requirements.

step.name: Install retry + retry-after parsing.
step.description: Input: tenacity dependency. Action: catch `RateLimitError`; read `retry-after` from headers; sleep that value; bound retries to 3 with jitter on 5xx + 529. Output: decorated call function.

step.name: Wire shared rate bucket across workers.
step.description: Input: worker pool topology. Action: place a shared token bucket (Redis or in-process) sized to tier capacity; gate every call on `bucket.acquire()`. Output: shared bucket.
step.note: Step 4. Required input: worker pool topology.

step.name: Enable fallback logging.
step.description: Input: ClaudeService instance. Action: log `response.model` + `usage` on every call; alert when `response.model != requested_model`. Output: logging hooks.

step.name: Validate.
step.description: Input: produced policy JSON. Action: run `scripts/validate-claude-best-practices.py`; smoke-test by running 10 calls and asserting cache hit > 0.70 from call #2 onward. Output: green validator + green smoke.
step.note: Step 6. Required input: produced policy JSON.
